subject: [PATCH v10 12/15] userfaultfd: add UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC for async fault resolution

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the userfaultfd system, called UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC, which allows for asynchronous resolution of read-write page faults. This feature is designed to work in conjunction with working-set tracking and does not require the delivery of a message to resolve the fault. Instead, the kernel restores access to the pages in-place, allowing the faulting thread to continue without blocking. The patch also includes updates to various kernel files to support this new feature.
